mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 65% of instances when unemployment rises above the threshold over a 3-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in consumer and housing demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint declines in consumption and housing starts fail to predict negative returns with a rank IC below 0.02 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive industrial production growth correlates with negative 5-day returns in > 60% of observations during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation readings above the 210 index level trigger expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Inflation above 210 fails to predict negative 60-day returns, with mean forward returns exceeding +0.5% per month.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining total nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment rates signals structural labor market deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The payroll-unemployment divergence shows no predictive power for 20-day returns, with out-of-sample R-squared below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding aggregate demand and corporate revenue fundamentals, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to predict positive 60-day returns, with a negative rank IC over consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 110 index threshold indicates severe manufacturing contraction and supply-side weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5-day returns in > 70% of instances when industrial production drops below the threshold.
